message:
test(install): mark environment-dependent tests as ignored

The tests `real_system_check_resources_ok` and `real_system_can_compile_ok`
assume at least 2GB disk space available, which fails in constrained
environments like CI containers or sandboxed runners.

Fixes: br-28wy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
